objective: AUTO_FOLDER_REFACTOR_BUGFIND: visibility refactors under lib to expose hidden import/provenance/endpoint assumptions without changing public behavior except proven regressions.
completedSlices: Added preservesCorePairingDescriptorRepeatedQueryValuesAfterBlankCopyArtifacts regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because NavivoxPairingDescriptor.parse used Uri.queryParameters and blank duplicate params erased earlier websocket/token values.

Extracted navivoxFirstNonBlankQueryParameterValues/navivoxFirstNonBlankQueryParameterValue in core/protocol/serialization/navivox_json.dart as a shared query contract for copied URLs/descriptors with duplicate blank parameters.
Updated core/protocol/pairing/navivox_pairing_descriptor.dart to parse repeated query fields via the shared first-nonblank query helper.
Updated features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart to use the shared query helper instead of its private duplicate.
Added stripsAngleBracketFromSharedTextUrl characterization in parser_regression_test.dart; current parser already preserves this behavior.

Added prefersLaterSharedTextUrlWhenTokenBelongsToThatUrl regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because equal-rank bare shared-text URLs kept the first URL, pairing a later setup token with an earlier docs URL.

Made shared-text endpoint candidate ranking explicit about per-endpoint token segments in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart; equal-rank candidates now prefer the URL whose following segment contains the token before the next URL.

Added doesNotLetMetadataOnlyJsonEntryStealDefaultCredentialsFromConcreteEntry regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because a metadata-only entry inherited top-level credentials and outranked a concrete entry by field score, mixing provenance.

Extracted _JsonConnectionImportFields with hasExplicitConnectionFields in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart; JSON candidate ranking now prefers complete entries that carry explicit endpoint/token provenance before richer metadata-only inherited candidates.

Added prefersEntryAliasOverrideOverTopLevelJsonDefaultAlias regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because entry aliases such as baseUrl/pairingToken coexisted with top-level default base_url/token and canonical alias lookup chose the stale defaults.

Made JSON default inheritance alias-aware in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart by extracting _removeDefaultJsonAliasesOverriddenByEntry and explicit _jsonConnectionImportFieldAliasGroups; nonblank entry aliases now clear same-field default aliases before candidate construction.

Added readsEarliestLabeledSharedTextTokenAfterSelectedUrl regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because _firstLabeledToken prioritized label spelling order over text order, so a later 'Pairing token' beat an earlier 'Token'.

Extracted _LabeledTokenMatch in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart; labeled shared-text token selection now compares candidate match offsets so the earliest token mention wins independent of label alias order.

Added doesNotLetLabelBeforeLaterSharedTextUrlConsumeThatUrlAsToken regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because a dangling label in one endpoint segment could skip across the next URL and make the earlier endpoint appear to have that later token.

Made shared-text token segment bounds explicit by carrying tokenSearchEnd on _SharedTextEndpointCandidate and passing it through _sharedTextImportToken/_firstToken/_readTokenAt so labels cannot consume token text outside the selected endpoint segment.

Added doesNotUseUrlAfterSharedTextTokenLabelAsToken regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because broad labeled-token grammar accepted a following https:// URL as a pairing token.

Extracted _readLabeledTokenAt/_looksLikeUrlToken in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart so labeled-token parsing rejects URL-shaped prose/navigation values while leaving generic nvbx_ fallback token scanning unchanged.
nextCandidates: features/servers/pairing token edit provenance policy at widget level if product decides credential edits should also clear pairing-link failure copy
features/servers/setup connect-intent payload source precedence and stale direct-app-open payload replay
features/servers/shared/connection_import shared-text URL/token provenance around equal-rank candidates with metadata-only URLs
features/servers/shared/connection_import token grammar visibility: distinguish broad human-entered tokens from accidental prose labels beyond URL-shaped values

dart run features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: metadata-only JSON entry inherited top-level credentials and outranked an explicit connection entry)
dart run features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: entry baseUrl/pairingToken aliases lost to top-level base_url/token defaults)
dart run features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: label alias order selected later 'Pairing token' over earlier 'Token')
dart run features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart (failed before fix: dangling token label before later URL made earlier endpoint consume the later URL/token segment)
